title: Vnx Realistic (Vanilla)
description: Vnx Realistic (Vanilla) — Minecraft enhanced with realistic visuals and improved world generation, while staying true to vanilla.
body:
# 🌿 Vnx Realistic (Vanilla)
 
*Immerse yourself in a more realistic Minecraft experience while keeping vanilla gameplay.*

**Vnx Realistic (Vanilla)** is a Fabric-based modpack that enhances Minecraft with realistic visuals, improved terrain, better animations, and performance optimizations — all while staying true to the vanilla experience.  

---

## ✨ Features

### 🌄 Realistic Visuals
- 🪵 Improved entity animations  
- 💡 Dynamic lighting & enhanced environmental effects  
- 🌳 Natural foliage & vegetation  
- ☁️ Better clouds and skies  

### 🏔️ Enhanced World Generation
- 🌱 Diverse biomes & landscapes  
- 🏔️ Large, realistic mountains  
- 🔎 More exploration opportunities  
- 🌾 Natural terrain flow  

### ⚡ Performance Optimized
- 🚀 Smooth gameplay even with visual improvements  
- 🧠 Reduced memory usage & faster chunk rendering  
- 💻 Compatible with most systems  

### 🎮 Vanilla+ Philosophy
- ❌ No complicated tech mods  
- ⚖️ No drastic gameplay changes  
- 🎯 Maintains the true vanilla feel  

---

## 📦 Requirements
- **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.x  
- **Mod Loader:** Fabric  
- **RAM:** 6–8 GB recommended  
- **Shaders:** Optional but recommended for the best visuals  

---

## 🚀 Installation

### Using Modrinth App (Recommended)
1. Install the Modrinth App  
2. Search for **Vnx Realistic (Vanilla)**  
3. Click **Install** and launch the game  

### Manual Installation
1. Download the `.mrpack` file  
2. Import it into a compatible launcher (Prism Launcher, ATLauncher, or Modrinth App)  
3. Launch the game  

---

## 🙏 Credits
All mods, shaders, and resource packs belong to their respective creators.  
This modpack only bundles and configures them for a cohesive experience.  
Support the original developers by visiting their project pages.

---

## 📝 Notes
This modpack is evolving. Future updates may include:  
- 🌟 New visual improvements  
- ⚡ Additional performance tweaks  
- 🌍 Expanded world generation
